headline: Klarna Group (KLAR) Deepens Travel Ties With Flix, Southwest Amid Push For Klarna Bank USA
summary: In early July 2026, Flix SE and Southwest Airlines Co. each announced expanded partnerships with Klarna Group, embedding Klarna’s flexible pay-in-full, installment, and financing options into their booking platforms across the U.S. and 21 international markets while removing foreign exchange fees for many cross-border journeys. Together with Klarna’s recent application to establish Klarna Bank USA as an FDIC-insured Utah industrial bank, these moves highlight the company’s push to integrate...
